title: cyathea ursina
intro: Cyathea ursina, also known as the Mountain Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyathea ursina include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. Cyathea ursina is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and can be used topically to treat skin conditions or ingested to support overall health.
